prose:
**Frontier-Orbital Gap of O₂**  
• Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap)
• Level of theory: DFT, tier standard → B3LYP/def2-TZVP (plain RKS/UKS, no density fitting)
• Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz`, single-point (no relaxation)
• Environment: gas phase (implicit solvent omitted)
• Charge/multiplicity: 0, 3 (triplet O₂)
• Software: PySCF backend (via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill), default verbosity
• SCF convergence: converged in 7 cycles; no warnings reported
• CLI invocation:  
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/oxygen/oxygen.xyz --method dft --tier standard --mult 3 --charge 0 --accept-defaults --stdout json --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9nr_bgo8/live.json`  
• Output JSON: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp9nr_bgo8/live.json`  

Results (all in eV):  
  HOMO = –8.8739616  
  LUMO = –3.5859031  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = **5.2880586**  

No engine warnings. Provenance: computed.
